ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "insured_zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the customer */,
  "insured_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer */,
  "insured_education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "insured_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "insured_hobbies" TEXT /* Hobbies of the customer */,
  "insured_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the customer */,
  "capital_gains" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the customer */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the customer */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "customer_city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "customer_state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "customer_country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "customer_social_security_number" TEXT /* Social Security Number (SSN) of the customer */,
  "customer_credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "customer_marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the policy belongs to */,
  "policy_number" INTEGER /* Policy number */,
  "policy_bind_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was bound */,
  "policy_state" TEXT /* State where the policy is active */,
  "policy_csl" TEXT /* Coverage limits of the policy */,
  "policy_deductible" INTEGER /* Deductible amount of the policy */,
  "policy_annual_premium" REAL /* Annual premium of the policy */,
  "umbrella_limit" INTEGER /* Umbrella limit of the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance policy */,
  "policy_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "policy_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy */,
  "policy_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who issued the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the claim is associated with */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident */,
  "collision_type" TEXT /* Type of collision */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "authorities_contacted" TEXT /* Authorities contacted during the incident */,
  "incident_state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "incident_hour_of_the_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the incident occurred */,
  "number_of_vehicles_involved" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the incident */,
  "property_damage" TEXT /* Whether there was property damage */,
  "bodily_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of bodily injuries */,
  "witnesses" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses */,
  "police_report_available" TEXT /* Whether a police report is available */,
  "total_claim_amount" INTEGER /* Total amount of the claim */,
  "injury_claim" INTEGER /* Amount of the injury claim */,
  "property_claim" INTEGER /* Amount of the property claim */,
  "vehicle_claim" INTEGER /* Amount of the vehicle claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim */,
  "claim_date_closed" TEXT /* Date when the claim was closed */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim */,
  "claim_adjuster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claims adjuster handling the claim */,
  "claim_payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was paid */,
  "claim_payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the vehicle is insured under */,
  "auto_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "auto_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "auto_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "vehicle_vin_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the VIN has been verified */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_registration_state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle is registered */,
  "vehicle_registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_details" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the incident is associated with */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the incident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions during the incident */,
  "traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the incident */,
  "incident_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed weather conditions during the incident */,
  "incident_road_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed road conditions during the incident */,
  "incident_traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed traffic conditions during the incident */,
  "incident_injury_details" TEXT /* Details of any injuries sustained */,
  "incident_property_damage_details" TEXT /* Details of any property damage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., claims adjuster, manager, admin) */,
  "user_password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the claim */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the claim was accessed */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the claim was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the event is associated with */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., policy change, claim submission) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy the event is associated with */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., coverage change, premium adjustment) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_history_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim the event is associated with */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., status update, amount adjustment) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "event_source" TEXT /* Source of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_history_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)
